id.description: Unique dialogue tree id. A mob template references this via its 'dialogue_id' field.

npc_id.description: Id of the mob this dialogue belongs to (informational; the link is via the mob's dialogue_id).

start_node.description: Key of the node in 'nodes' where the conversation begins. Must be a defined node.

nodes.description: Map of node id -> node. Response targets must reference keys in this map.

text.description: The NPC's spoken line for this node.

responses.description: Ordered, numbered responses shown to the player. An empty or omitted list makes the node terminal (ends the conversation).

text.description: The response text shown to the player.

target.description: Id of the node this response advances to. Must be a defined node.
